name: Rigatoni Alla Fontina
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Cook the rigatoni in 5 to 6 quarts salted boiling water until done (they will finish cooking in the oven).
3. Drain well and place in a large bowl.
4. Add two-thirds of the butter, half of the Parmigiano cheese, and nutmeg. Mix well until all the pasta is coated.
5. In a buttered baking dish, make layers of pasta, fontina cheese, Parmigiano cheese, and repeat until the pasta is used up, ending with a layer of fontina on top.
6. Sprinkle with remaining Parmigiano cheese and black pepper.
7. Dot with the remaining butter.
8. Bake for 15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted. May be served on flat plates.
